name: Grilled Beef Blade Steaks with Spicy Orange Marinade
recipeIngredient: 6 1-inch Boneless beef blade steaks, pierced all over
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large shallow pan, arrange the blade steaks in one layer and add the bell peppers.
2. In a blender, blend the orange zest, juice, oil, garlic, soy sauce, red pepper flakes, vinegar, and salt until the marinade is smooth. Pour over the steaks and peppers, coating them thoroughly.
3. Let the mixture marinate, covered and chilled overnight.
4. Grill the steaks and peppers on an oiled rack 5-6 inches over the coals for 8 minutes each side for med-rare.
5. Transfer the steaks to a platter and let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
